name: event_id
description: Unique UUID of the outbox audit event.

name: event_type
description: Type of financial event (e.g. MONETARY_TRANSFER_EXECUTED, FEE_REVERSED).

name: account_id
description: Associated financial or card account ID.

name: payload
description: Strongly typed native JSON structured event payload.

name: created_at
description: Event creation timestamp for monthly partitioning.
